events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. 

Summary: Mixing neutrals and grounds on a common bus in a subpanel (rather than only at the service/first disconnect) is a fail-level, high-risk NEC violation — it creates parallel neutral current paths that can energize equipment enclosures under normal load, a shock and fire hazard. Immediate controls: de-energize/LOTO, separate the neutral and grounding buses per NEC 408.40/250.24(A)(5), verify single-point bonding per 200.4, confirm 110.26 working clearance, then test and re-inspect before re-energizing.
